assertions: Agent Card has non-empty string field name
Agent Card has non-empty string field description
Agent Card has non-empty string field version
Agent Card has non-empty string field protocol
Agent Card has non-empty string field protocolVersion
Agent Card has non-empty string field status
Agent Card has non-empty string field agent_id
Agent Card has non-empty string field discovery_topic
Agent Card has non-empty string field task_topic
Agent Card has non-empty string field owner_topic
Agent Card uses protocol=a2a and protocolVersion=1.0
Agent Card advertises Logos identity authentication
Agent Card advertises LEZ payment mechanism
Agent Card advertises A2A lifecycle and messaging skills
task lifecycle emits queued -> transport_sent -> working -> completed
transport publishes an a2a.task.request envelope to the discovered task_topic
envelope task_id/from/to/skill/params bind to the completed task
discovery registry returns the schema-agent Agent Card
